input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.6.1.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.6.1.2
            TITLE: when the operating condition is damp, teams may change between dry tires and wet tires:

            CONTENT:
            rule D.6.1.2: When the operating condition is Damp, teams may change between Dry Tires and Wet Tires:
D.6.1.2 When the operating condition is Damp, teams may change between Dry Tires and Wet Tires:  
a. Any time during the Acceleration, Skidpad, and Autocross Events  
b. Any time before starting their Endurance Event

final_answer: rule D.6.1.2: When the operating condition is Damp, teams may change between Dry Tires and Wet Tires: D.6.1.2 When the operating condition is Damp, teams may change between Dry Tires and Wet Tires: a. Any time during the Acceleration, Skidpad, and Autocross Events b. Any time before starting their Endurance Event
